lenses.guidance: Anointing oil (vv 10-12), blood on ear-thumb-toe (vv 23-24), and seven days of waiting (vv 33-35) — the ordination pattern foreshadows the qualified High Priest of Heb 5:1-10, anointed and consecrated.

Blood applied to Aaron's right ear, thumb, and toe (v 24) consecrates hearing, action, and walk. Heb 9:11-14 takes the priestly-pattern to its head: Christ's blood consecrates a perfect High Priest forever.

Structured as ritual-narrative: command (v 1), gather (v 4), wash (v 6), clothe (vv 7-9), anoint (vv 10-12), sacrifice (vv 14-29), wait (v 33). Each step is a marked liturgical beat in the chapter's form.
